data.content:
Implementation plan:
1. Scope the removal to the main prompt-guidance feature only. Delete AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md guidance detection and auto-fix behavior while leaving agent execution prompts and knot/bead workflow prompts untouched.
2. Update doctor internals in src/lib/doctor.ts. Remove prompt-guidance constants/helpers, the checkPromptGuidance diagnostic, its runDoctor/streamDoctor registration, the runDoctorFix/applyFix branch, and any prompt-guidance-specific strategy/examples or unused imports.
3. Remove CLI/install/setup mutations for AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md. In scripts/install.sh delete prompt template env vars/helpers, drop the foolery prompt command and help text, and keep doctor --fix limited to remaining diagnostics. In scripts/setup.sh remove the prompt-guidance wizard and template resolution/update helpers.
4. Remove packaging/docs references tied to prompt guidance. Update scripts/build-runtime-artifact.sh so runtime bundles stop carrying prompt templates, then scrub README and any docs/audit references that mention foolery prompt or doctor prompt-guidance checks. If PROMPT.md / PROMPT_BEATS.md / PROMPT_KNOTS.md become unreferenced after that, delete them as dead assets.
5. Rewrite tests around the new behavior. Delete or replace prompt-guidance-focused coverage in src/lib/__tests__/doctor.test.ts, src/lib/__tests__/doctor-coverage.test.ts, and src/lib/__tests__/doctor-applyfix.test.ts; adjust any streamDoctor category-count/order assertions; add targeted assertions that doctor no longer emits prompt-guidance diagnostics.
6. Validation for implementation: run targeted tests for doctor/install/setup affected suites first, then the repo quality gates required by AGENTS.md (bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build).

Planned child knots:
- foolery-e01f: Remove prompt-guidance checks and fixes from doctor.
- foolery-c891: Remove prompt-guidance commands from launcher and setup.
- foolery-9c9a: Clean prompt-guidance docs, runtime packaging, and tests.

Complexity: moderate.
Risks:
- The codebase uses the word prompt for both AGENTS/CLAUDE guidance and runtime agent instructions; implementation must avoid deleting execution-prompt plumbing outside the prompt-guidance feature.
- scripts/install.sh and scripts/setup.sh share overlapping prompt-template behavior, so removing only one side will leave stale UX and dead runtime assets.
- Streamed doctor tests assert category count/order, so removing prompt-guidance will require coordinated test updates rather than narrow snapshots.
